category_sources: source_facts.description says Toolkit for eXosip2; Savannah project page says eXosip hides SIP protocol complexity for VoIP telephony applications.
display_name_sources: Official Antisip documentation title is libeXosip2; Savannah project name is The eXtended osip library.
docs_sources: Official Savannah page links generated Antisip documentation; Antisip page is the generated libeXosip2 API documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Savannah exosip page lists a Git Repository and Savannah git clone convention uses https://git.savannah.nongnu.org/git/exosip.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description plus Savannah and Antisip documentation describe SIP, VoIP endpoint, registration, call, messaging, and presence APIs.
